creator: david.keller@litchis.fr
text:
I've only set ifp->if_hw_tsomax=65518 as other settings depend on attributes not available in releng/10.1.

=> It crashed after 1h movie playing over nfs.

I'll wait for 10.2 to perform the full configuration test, as it's a used server I can't switch to -current :-)

What about comment 10 ?
